author: CasaOS Team
description: Calibre-web is a web app providing a clean interface for browsing, reading and downloading eBooks using an existing Calibre database. It is also possible to integrate google drive and edit metadata and your calibre library through the app itself.
tagline: Web app for browsing, reading and downloading eBooks stored in a Calibre database
release_notes:
- 0.6.24 adds audio-file metadata extraction during upload and a refreshed PDF viewer.
- Multiple book formats can be uploaded with progress and metadata merge support, including drag and drop.
- Fixes include Kobo downloads and cover sizing, metadata search results, thumbnail generation on Google Drive, split-library database saving, Amazon UK links, Safari bookmarks, LDAP import, and Calibre convert parameters with spaces.
title: Calibre-web
